---
title: "Exploring within-species variation in suboscine song"
image: "../images/card_pics/female_antshrike.jpg"
description: "We investigate how and why song varies within and among individuals of suboscine birds, which lack vocal learning. Acoustic analyses reveal the evolutionary balance between genetic constraint and ecological adaptation."
categories: ["Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Erin Stewart, Austin Barth"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
